title: FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION - 211info
text: DEVNW CORVALLIS FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Counseling services for those at risk of foreclosure or eviction to find options and solutions to keep their home. Can participate in mediation. 2525 SE Third Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (503) 752-7220 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 752-7220 Alternate (541) 345-7106 ext 2060 Assistant Director Ross Kanaga [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to enroll and submit documents or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Application LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the second floor at the corner of 3rd Street and SW Madison Avenue. Services: Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE RENTALS HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - LINN-BENTON-LINCOLN COUNTY HOME REPAIR PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DEVNW CORVALLIS
